# Proof Status

## Proven under assumptions

```text
ranking by expected utility
linearity of expectation for multi-signal utility
retention curve determines expected watch time
Bayesian posterior updating for wave tests
bandit exploration necessity under uncertainty
```

## Publicly supported

```text
TikTok uses user/content/user-info signals
YouTube Shorts exposes viewed-vs-swiped
Meta combines many predictions including sharing
YouTube production recommender used candidate generation and ranking
Instagram has originality/new-audience recommendation updates
```

## Empirically testable

```text
TRIBE incremental lift
shareability model lift
trend/saturation model lift
audience-fit model lift
negative-risk model lift
Bayesian expansion-wave calibration
```

## Not proven

```text
exact private platform coefficients
exact platform thresholds
exact source code or model architecture
exact per-user utility function
```

## Correct final claim

The architecture is defensible and testable. The coefficients must be learned from analytics.
